name: Tool Card: Glob
summary: Displays glob pattern search results with matched file paths
goals: Render glob search results as a list of matched file paths
Show pattern and match count summary

specDetail.description: A specialized tool card for glob file search operations. Displays the search pattern, number of matches, and the list of matched file paths with their modification times.

parameters.name: pattern
parameters.description: Glob pattern used for the search

constraints: Must display match count prominently in the card header
Must support collapsing the match list when exceeding 20 results
Must show relative paths from the project root

acceptanceCriteria.given: a glob search operation returns matches
acceptanceCriteria.then: the pattern, match count, and file path list are displayed

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
